_comment: Group A3: Two-phase envelope for asymmetric bipartite matching. 20x20 zigzag topology (40 edges, degree 2 each side), fixed right-side service rates, customer-only metrics. Run: python main.py configs/two_phase_bipartite_asym.json

model._comment_edges: Circular zigzag: left node i connects to right nodes i and (i+1)%20. 40 edges, degree 2 on each side.

arrivals._comment_asymmetric: lambda_R fixed (service capacity). lambda_L computed as (1-eps)*fair_share_capacity per left node. For this zigzag with lambda_R=0.8 and deg_R=2, capacity_i = 0.8, so lambda_L_i = (1-eps)*0.8.
